name: Why Even Try
original_name: Why ต้องพยายาม
overview: Sol and Wine have been dating for two years. At first, their lives were very happy. Sol doted on Wine and took great care of her. But as time went on, Sol changed completely. She stopped caring for Wine and paying attention to her as she used to. Despite Sol's change, Wine continued doing everything the same and tried to maintain their relationship. Until one day, Wine realized that she was the only one making an effort, while Sol hardly did anything. What will be the end of their story? Don't miss it.

trailers.title: TEASER ❘ GL Mini Series ❘ Why ต้องพยายาม (Why Even Try)
